zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Clinton於大約1260年出生在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓時，她的父親Thomas Clinton31歲，母親Maud Bracebridge27歲。她於1277年與Thomas De Wolvey Knight在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年在英國瓦維其可爾沃爾維享年24歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾沃爾維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Clinton于大约1260年出生在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓时，她的父亲Thomas Clinton31岁，母亲Maud Bracebridge27岁。她于1277年与Thomas De Wolvey Knight在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年在英国瓦維其可爾沃爾維享年24岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾沃爾維。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Clinton was born about 1260, in Amington, Staffordshire, England, her father, Thomas Clinton, was 31 and her mother, Maud Bracebridge, was 27. She married Thomas De Wolvey Knight in 1277, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1283, in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 24, and was buried in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Clinton est née environ 1260, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Clinton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud Bracebridge, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas De Wolvey Knight en 1277, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1283, à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Wolvey, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Clinton um 1260 in Amington, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Clinton 31 und ihre Mutter Maud Bracebridge 27. Sie hat 1277 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas De Wolvey Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1283 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Clinton è nata il circa 1260 nel Amington, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Clinton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Maud Bracebridge, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Thomas De Wolvey Knight nel 1277, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1283, nel Wolvey, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolta a Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Clintonが約1260年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Clintonは31歳，母Maud Bracebridgeは27歳であった。1277年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでThomas De Wolvey Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーで24歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Clinton(이)가 대략 1260년 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Clinton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Bracebridge(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1277년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Thomas De Wolvey Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 영국 워윅실르 울비에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 울비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Clinton nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Clinton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud Bracebridge, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas De Wolvey Knight em 1277, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1283, em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 24 anos, e foi sepultada em Wolvey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Clinton родилась около 1260 г. в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Clinton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud Bracebridge, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas De Wolvey Knight в 1277 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1283 г. в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности волви, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
